name: AvbSetCrfAudioSampleClockFrequency
title: AvbSetCrfAudioSampleClockFrequency
description: The function sets the audio sample clock frequency of the CRF stream originated by the Talker.
The nominal frequency of the audio sample clock is the frequency set by this function multiplied by the clock multiplier (see AvbSetCrfAudioSampleClockMultiplier).
